summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fase 2 - Gestão de Pendências Documentais endpoints. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Fixed critical bug in repository where session.add() was used instead of session.merge() for update operations, causing UNIQUE constraint failures on document submission.

critical.issue: Repository's salvar() method used session.add() instead of session.merge() causing UNIQUE constraint failure on updates - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: Repository pattern implementation had a bug - salvar() should use merge() for upsert behavior, not add()
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for easy identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fase 2 - Gestão de Pendências Documentais is fully functional. All CRUD operations, statistics, and BI dashboard endpoints working correctly.

reference_endpoints.GET /api/documentos/tipos: PASS - Returns 17 document types with value/label
reference_endpoints.GET /api/documentos/prioridades: PASS - Returns 4 priorities (baixa, media, alta, urgente)

statistics_endpoints.GET /api/documentos/stats/resumo: PASS - Returns total, pendentes, enviados, em_analise, aprovados, recusados, expirados, taxa_aprovacao, total_em_aberto
statistics_endpoints.GET /api/documentos/stats/por-tipo: PASS - Returns stats grouped by document type
statistics_endpoints.GET /api/documentos/stats/vencendo: PASS - Returns documents expiring within specified days

bi_dashboard_endpoints.GET /api/documentos/bi/matriculas: PASS - Returns KPIs: total_pedidos, pedidos_mes, taxa_conversao, por_status
bi_dashboard_endpoints.GET /api/documentos/bi/evolucao: PASS - Returns monthly evolution data for charts
bi_dashboard_endpoints.GET /api/documentos/bi/reembolsos: PASS - Returns reembolso KPIs: total, abertos, aguardando, no_financeiro, pagos, pendentes
bi_dashboard_endpoints.GET /api/documentos/bi/pendencias: PASS - Returns pendencias KPIs: total, pendentes, em_aberto, taxa_aprovacao
bi_dashboard_endpoints.GET /api/documentos/bi/completo: PASS - Returns complete dashboard with matriculas, evolucao_mensal, reembolsos, pendencias, resumo

crud_operations.POST /api/documentos: PASS - Creates new pendencia with pedido_id, tipo, obrigatorio, prioridade, prazo_dias, descricao
crud_operations.POST /api/documentos/padrao/{pedido_id}: PASS - Creates 5 standard pendencias (rg_completo, cpf, comprovante_residencia, foto_3x4, historico_escolar)
crud_operations.GET /api/documentos/pedido/{pedido_id}: PASS - Lists all pendencias for a pedido with total, pendentes, completo stats

workflow_operations.POST /api/documentos/{pendencia_id}/envi: PASS - Submits document with arquivo_url, arquivo_nome, arquivo_tamanho
workflow_operations.POST /api/documentos/{pendencia_id}/vali: PASS - Approves document, sets status to 'aprovado'
PASS - Rejects document with motivo, sets status to 'recusado'
PASS - Returns 400 when rejecting without motivo
PASS - Returns 422 when validating non-submitted document

validation_queue.GET /api/documentos/validacao/fila: PASS - Returns queue of documents awaiting validation

authentication.Assistente role access: PASS - Assistente can access all endpoints

repository_merge_fix.reason: session.add() causes UNIQUE constraint failure when updating existing records; merge() handles both insert and update
